title: [EDIT] Dataset issue - Fixed!
content:
UPDATE We were able to fix the issues with the dataset and submissions are back on. Good luck everyone!

Hi everyone, we temporarily disabled submissions because there is a rerun dataset issue that we're resolving. We'll update the forum as soon as we have an update. Thank you for your patience!

María

comments.content: @ryanholbrook Why all my last submissions got same high score 11429.285?

replies.content: did you find any reason for that ?

comments.content: The issue has been resolved. Apologies everyone for the disruption! Please let us know if anything else comes up.

replies.content: Do we need to re-download any files? Or was this an issue on your side?
This was just on the backend. No need to redownload anything.
